rulings.Case Title: SHAKISHA JOHNSON VS. WESTBROOK HOUSING PARTNERS, L.P. ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
rulings.Rulings: On the Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for December 23, 2024, line 1. COUNSEL FOR PLAINTIFF SHAKISHA JOHNSON'S MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD. Plaintiff's Motion for Withdrawal of Attorney of Record is GRANTED. Counsel's declaration notes a breach of the legal agreement, which has rendered it unreasonably difficult for the lawyer to carry out the representation effectively. =(501/REQ) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849; or Phone Dial in: (669) 254-5252; Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849). Parties who intend to appear at the hearing must give notice to opposing parties and the court promptly, but no later than 4:00 p.m. the court day before the hearing unless the tentative ruling has specified that a hearing is required. Notice of contesting a tentative ruling shall be provided by sending an email to the court to Department501ContestTR@sftc.org with a copy to all other parties stating, without argument, the portion(s) of the tentative ruling that the party contests. A party may not argue at the hearing if the opposing party is not so notified, and the opposing party does not appear.

rulings.Case Title: CSE SAFEGUARD INSURANCE COMPANY, A CALIFORNIA VS. SELINA CHAU-FONG YU YOUNG ET AL
rulings.Rulings: On the Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for December 23, 2024, line 2. ABDELHAKIM MOULINE, AMIRA MOULINE, SALIM MOULINE'S DEMURRER to COMPLAINT. Necessary Party Mouline's Demurrer to Complaint is OVERRULED. The Moulines are properly joined as necessary parties to this subrogation action, and Insurer stated facts sufficient to constitute a cause of action for declaratory relief. =(501/REQ) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849; or Phone Dial in: (669) 254-5252; Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849). rulings.Case Title: ADAM FAGEL ET AL VS. OYVIND SEAN KINSEY ET AL
rulings.Rulings: On the Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for December 23, 2024, line 3. DEFENDANT ONERENT INC.'S DEMURRER to COMPLAINT. Defendant Onerent Inc.'s Demurrer to Complaint is SUSTAINED, in part, and OVERRULED, in part. The demurrers to causes of action 9 and 10 are sustained without leave to amend because a one-year statute of limitations applies, and the Complaint was filed more than one year after the termination of the tenancy. The demurrers to causes of action 1-8, and 11-13 are overruled; these causes of action are sufficiently pled. =(501/REQ) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849; or Phone Dial in: (669) 254-5252; Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849). Notice of contesting a tentative ruling shall be provided by sending an email to the court to Department501ContestTR@sftc.org with a copy to all other parties stating, without argument, the portion(s) of the tentative ruling that the party contests. A party may not argue at the hearing if the opposing party is not so notified, and the opposing party does not appear.

rulings.Case Title: 1454-1464 UNION G1, LP VS. LINNEA MORSE ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion For Entry Of Judgment Pursuant To The Stipulation
rulings.Rulings: On the Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for December 23, 2024, line 4. PLAINTIFF 1454-1464 UNION G1, LP'S Motion For Entry Of Judgment Pursuant To The Stipulation. Plaintiff's Motion for Entry of Judgment Pursuant to Stipulation is DENIED. Plaintiff did not sign the stipulation until 30 minutes after the purported deadline for Defendant's first installment payment. To the extent that payment was due, Defendant's breach was not material. =(501/REQ) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849; or Phone Dial in: (669) 254-5252; Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849). rulings.Case Title: 2265 MISSION STREET PROPERTIES, INC. VS. KEVIN STULL ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS
rulings.Rulings: On the Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for December 23, 2024, line 7. DEFENDANT KEVIN STULL'S MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS. Defendant's Motion to Quash or Stay or Dismiss is DENIED. The fact that the Complaint's caption mixes up the parties does not make the summons defective under CCP Sections 412.20(a)(2) or (a)(3). The body of the Complaint makes it clear that Mr. Sully is the Defendant. =(501/REQ) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849; or Phone Dial in: (669) 254-5252; Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849). rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Of Defendant Suhey Alvarez Against Winterland San Francisco Partners
rulings.Rulings: On the Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for December 23, 2024, line 11. DEFENDANT SUHEY ALVAREZ'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Against Winterland San Francisco Partners. Defendant's Motion for Summary Judgment is GRANTED. rulings.Case Title: GEARY COURTYARD 639 LLC VS. ASHLEY JONES ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION / Notice Of Motion & Motion To Deem Requests For Admissions Admitted And Request Monetary Sanctions; Memorandum Of Points & Authorities
rulings.Rulings: On the Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for December 23, 2024, line 8. PLAINTIFF GEARY COURTYARD 639 LLC'S Motion To Deem Requests For Admissions Admitted And Request Monetary Sanctions. Plaintiff's Motion to Deem Requests for Admissions Admitted and Request for Monetary Sanctions is GRANTED, in part. Plaintiff's Requests for Admissions shall be deemed admitted, subject to Opposition. Plaintiff's Request for Admissions was served on November 27, 2024 via overnight mail, and Defendant has not responded at the time of the hearing. Plaintiff's request for monetary sanctions is denied. =(501/REQ) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849; or Phone Dial in: (669) 254-5252; Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849).
